category_sources: source_facts.description says cdb creates and reads constant databases; official cdb.cr.yp.to pages document cdbmake/cdbget constant database tools.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cdb; official homepage at https://cdb.cr.yp.to/ uses the cdb project name.
docs_sources: Official project site cdb.cr.yp.to is the primary documentation surface and links/versioned manpage-style documentation for cdb tools.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official cdb site provides source archives but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists command-line tools; source_facts.description and official cdbmake documentation describe constant database creation and lookup.
